revisions.*: Because "rvslots" was not specified, a legacy format has been used for the output. This format is deprecated, and in the future the new format will always be used.

'''8-5-120

A connecting device for lengths of chain, usually of D or bow shape, having a removable pin through eyes at the open end.


Note:

The pin, called a shackle pin, may be screwed, clenched or secured by a forelock or split key. The terms screw shackle and clenched shackle apply to the corresponding cases.

{{IALAFooter}}

{{languages|Shackle}}
